title: T-013 — UI: FIN-019 Bulk Import Standard Costs MODAL-04 (bulk_import_csv_modal, §8.4)
prompt:
# T-013 — FIN-019 Bulk Import Standard Costs (MODAL-04) UI + Server Action

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.4 FIN-019 [UNIVERSAL]; §8.5 MODAL-04; §11.2 V-FIN-STD-01..08 per row.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:247-340` (`bulk_import_csv_modal`)

## Goal
Three-step wizard modal (Upload → Map & Validate → Review & Import) triggered from FIN-002 'Import CSV' CTA, supporting .csv / .xlsx files up to 500 rows. Server-side: file parser + per-row Zod validation + bulkImportStdCosts Server Action.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:247-340`.
shadcn primitives: Dialog, DialogContent, DialogFooter, Table, TableHeader, TableRow, TableCell, Checkbox, Button, Badge, Alert + custom Stepper component (build shared `components/ui/stepper.tsx`).
Parity checklist:
1. Step 1 (Upload): drag-and-drop zone (react-dropzone), `accept={'text/csv','application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'}`, 'Download Template CSV' link → GET `/api/finance/std-costs/import/template`.
2. Step 2 (Map & Validate): preview first 5 rows; auto-mapped column dropdowns (override allowed); validation summary tile (X valid / Y errors / Z warnings); error rows highlighted bg-red-50; 'Skip error rows and import valid only' Checkbox.
3. Step 3 (Review & Import): summary 'X standard costs will be created as drafts'; missing item_codes warning; 'Submit all for approval immediately (Finance Manager only)' Checkbox (gated by `fin.standard_cost.approve` permission).
4. Stepper component: clickable steps for completed; current step highlighted; build as shared primitive.
5. Cancel/Back/Next footer per step.

## Implementation contract
1. Route Handler `apps/web/app/api/finance/std-costs/import/parse/route.ts` (POST) — receives multipart upload, streams via `papaparse` (CSV) or `xlsx` package, returns `{ valid: Row[], errors: ErrorRow[], warnings: WarnRow[] }` per Zod stdCostImportSchema row-level validation (V-FIN-STD-01..08).
2. Route Handler `apps/web/app/api/finance/std-costs/import/template/route.ts` (GET) — streams template CSV with headers derived from stdCostImportSchema.
3. Server Action `bulkImportStdCosts(parsedRows, options)` — inside DB transaction; calls `createStandardCostDraft` per row; if `submit_for_approval=true` AND user has `fin.standard_cost.approve` permission, calls `submitForApproval` per id; logs to `import_skipped_rows` audit table for any skipped errors.
4. Modal component `bulk-import-modal.tsx` ('use client') with `useReducer` for step state.
5. RBAC: requires `fin.standard_cost.bulk_import` (T-001 permission).

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_components/bulk-import-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_actions/bulk-import.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/finance/std-costs/import/parse/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/finance/std-costs/import/template/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/components/ui/stepper.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/import-schema.ts [create] (Zod schema for row validation)
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_components/__tests__/bulk-import-modal.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_actions/__tests__/bulk-import.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given the modal renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:247-340, then 3 steps + Stepper + dropzone + preview + checkboxes + footer transitions match 1:1 (RTL parity snapshot — structural + interaction parity verified).
- Given a 600-row CSV uploaded, when parse runs, then response includes error 'Max 500 rows per import' and step does NOT advance. AND given a row with effective_to < effective_from, when validation runs, then it appears in errors[] with V-FIN-STD-01 rule cited.
- Given 'Skip error rows' checked and Import clicked, when commit, then only valid rows become drafts; skipped rows in import_skipped_rows audit table. AND given import succeeds, when modal closes, then FIN-002 list re-renders with new draft rows.
- Given user without fin.standard_cost.approve, when 'Submit for approval' Checkbox is rendered, then it is disabled/hidden with tooltip.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: bulk-import-modal.test.tsx asserts parity + step transitions + 500-row limit + Submit-on-approval gating. bulk-import.test.ts seeds CSV fixtures (valid / invalid rows), runs the action, asserts row counts + audit emission.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_components/__tests__/bulk-import-modal.test.tsx apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_actions/__tests__/bulk-import.test.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not parse files in the browser (memory + injection risk) — Route Handler only.
- Do not allow >500 rows per request (per PRD §8.4 wizard contract).
- Do not skip RLS / `withOrgContext` in the Server Action.
- Do not bypass V-FIN-STD-01..08 per-row validation.
- Do not log raw file contents — only schema-violating values + row indices.
- Do not stream the file to disk — keep in-memory; if too large, reject with 413.
- Do not auto-approve drafts unless user has `fin.standard_cost.approve` permission.
